message:
test(keyboard): add first-load overlay hotkey regression tests (s4qx.2.5)

Add 6 new tests ensuring overlay hotkeys work on first app load:
- All overlay actions have required fields for central registration
- Includes both eager (help, search) and lazy (simulationHub) overlays
- Overlay actions come from registry, not component mount
- Has substantial number of overlay hotkeys (30+)
- Overlay actions are all global scope
- Hotkey definitions can be created without overlay components

These tests guard against regressions where overlay hotkeys require
prior component mount. The architecture registers overlay hotkeys
centrally in App.tsx from ActionRegistry, not inside individual
overlay components.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
